questions.question: Describe the difference between logical and physical acquisition of mobile application data.
expectedPoints: Logical acquisition extracts file system data without physical storage access
Physical acquisition creates bit-for-bit copies of storage media
Logical is faster but may miss deleted data
Physical is more complete but technically complex

questions.question: Explain the process of analyzing a WhatsApp database from an Android device, including key files and their evidentiary value.
expectedPoints: Key files: msgstore.db (messages), wa.db (contacts), media files
Recovery of deleted messages from database free pages
Extraction and analysis of media files
Correlation of timestamps across different data sources
Documentation of findings for forensic report
